---
title: "Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo"
---

::: {.hero}
# Cold-Chain Freight Monte Carlo

Static, reproducible analysis site for transport + LCI comparisons across dry vs refrigerated product flows and diesel vs BEV scenarios.

`Latest validated transport refresh: 2026-03-09 (local_chunked_run)`  
`Validation gates: PASS`

::: {.cta-row}
[Methodology & Results](methodology_results.qmd){.btn-pill}
[Transport Results](viz/transport_results.qmd){.btn-pill}
[Scenario Explorer](viz/scenario_explorer.qmd){.btn-pill}
:::
:::

::: {.kpi-grid}
::: {.kpi-card}
<div class="kpi-label">Latest Run ID</div>
<div class="kpi-value">local_chunked_run</div>
Low-memory chunked production
:::

::: {.kpi-card}
<div class="kpi-label">Replicates</div>
<div class="kpi-value">20</div>
Validated + checkpointed (`CHUNK_SIZE=2`)
:::

::: {.kpi-card}
<div class="kpi-label">Scenario Rows</div>
<div class="kpi-value">80</div>
4 scenarios x 20 replicates
:::

::: {.kpi-card}
<div class="kpi-label">Animation Bundle</div>
<div class="kpi-value">6 files</div>
3 MP4 + 3 preview frames
:::
:::

## Explore { .section-title }

::: {.grid-2}
::: {.quick-card}
### Methodology and Initial Results
Start here for model pipeline, validation status, and initial figures.

[Open Methodology & Results](methodology_results.qmd)
:::

::: {.quick-card}
### Scenario Explorer
Interactive, artifact-driven scenario table and filters.

[Open Scenario Explorer](viz/scenario_explorer.qmd)
:::

::: {.quick-card}
### Flow Map
Static map from derived FAF flow artifacts.

[Open Flow Map](viz/flow_map.qmd)
:::

::: {.quick-card}
### Transport Results
Compiled transport outputs and supporting visuals.

[Open Transport Results](viz/transport_results.qmd)
:::
:::

## Reproducibility { .section-title }

::: {.panel}
### Runtime Model

- No live services are queried during page rendering.
- Pages consume committed/generated artifacts from `outputs/distribution/distribution_davis_fu_final/` and generated site assets.
- Works for local render and GitHub Pages publishing.

<span class="badge-soft">Offline-first</span>
<span class="badge-soft">Artifact-driven</span>
<span class="badge-soft">Deterministic snapshot</span>
:::

## Quick Start { .section-title }

```bash
git clone https://github.com/dMac716/coldchain-freight-montecarlo.git
cd coldchain-freight-montecarlo
bash tools/smoke_test.sh
quarto render site/
```

## Codespaces Path { .section-title }

```bash
# postCreate installs core deps
Rscript -e 'testthat::test_dir("tests/testthat")'
bash tools/build_presentation_artifacts.sh --skip-runs --with-animation
bash tools/validate_final_artifacts.sh
quarto render site/
```

## Pipeline Overview { .section-title }

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[data/inputs_local/*.csv] --> B[R/01_validate.R]
  B --> C[R/sim/* route simulation + paired uncertainty]
  C --> D[tools/run_distribution_fu_pipeline.sh]
  D --> E[outputs/distribution/distribution_davis_fu_final]
  E --> F[tools/generate_distribution_fu_site_figures.R]
  F --> G[site/assets/transport/*]
  G --> H[site/*]
  H --> I[docs/* GitHub Pages]
```
